in_flight_plans.notes: Background agent was still running when pause was invoked. Check `git log --oneline` on resume to see what actually committed.

remaining_plans.name: MainWindow integration + FakePlayer + full suite gate

unexpected_state.observation: git HEAD at pause time is '63b2de3 test(37-03): add failing tests for ToastOverlay widget'
unexpected_state.explanation: Plan 37-03 was NOT launched by the orchestrator. The 37-03 spawn was rejected by the user before the launched-in-background 37-02 agent was told about 37-03. Most likely explanation: the 37-02 background agent scope-bled into 37-03 test authoring on its own (possibly after reading the phase directory). Less likely: a separate agent process committed it.
unexpected_state.action_on_resume: Read commit 63b2de3 to verify what was actually authored. If it's a legitimate TDD-style failing test for ToastOverlay and 37-03 hasn't been completed yet, launch 37-03 with a prompt that notes the failing test already exists and must pass as the verify step. If it's scope bleed into a plan the agent shouldn't have touched, evaluate whether to keep it or revert.

decisions.rationale: User invoked /gsd-pause-work after 37-03 spawn was rejected

decisions.decision: Plan 37-02 was launched as a background agent with run_in_background=true
decisions.rationale: Wave 2 plans 37-02 and 37-03 are independent (zero file overlap) so they can run in parallel

next_action: 1) Read git log since 76ecfac (Plan 37-01 end). 2) Read commits 1b99d85 and 63b2de3 to see what 37-02 actually did. 3) Check background agent a3db1d65634d99411 status via SendMessage or Monitor. 4) Reconcile plan boundaries if scope bleed occurred. 5) Then launch 37-03 (if not effectively done) and 37-04 (integration).
context_notes: Phase 37 is the first real UI-content phase. Wave 1 (37-01 StationListPanel) completed cleanly with 18 new tests. Wave 2 has two parallel plans (37-02 NowPlayingPanel, 37-03 ToastOverlay). Wave 3 is 37-04 integration. The pause happened between spawning 37-02 in background and spawning 37-03 in foreground; user rejected 37-03 spawn and immediately invoked /gsd-pause-work.
